summary: Motivated B.Com (Honours) First Division graduate from University of Lucknow with a strong foundation in accountancy, GST, corporate accounting, audit, and business policy. Completed a 9-week Sales & Marketing internship at Wealth Clinic Pvt. Ltd., gaining hands-on experience in client relationship management, documentation, and target-based operations. Eager to contribute to banking operations, back-office functions, or finance-related roles with strong communication, analytical, and MS Office skills.
